introSection:
Revenge of the Mummy is a steel launched enclosed roller coaster located at Universal Studios Florida in Orlando, Florida, USA. It is themed around the Mummy film series.

An identical roller coaster also called Revenge of the Mummy opened with Universal Studios Singapore in 2010.

sections.title: History
sections.content: The addition of Revenge of the Mummy was announced in May 2003. It opened on May 21, 2004.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
Revenge of the Mummy is a launched roller coaster built by Premier Rides. The ride has three LIM launches, each of which are synchronized with a special effect or element, such as a turntable. The ride has multiple stops for show scenes featuring animatronics based on antagonists from the film series. Many projection effects are seen throughout the ride, including the turntable segment. There are also multiple dark sections with projections and lit up cutouts to simulate spirits and ghosts.

There are mandatory lockers in a nearby building in front of the attraction, similar to most other roller coasters across the park.

fullText:
Revenge of the Mummy is a steel launched enclosed roller coaster located at Universal Studios Florida in Orlando, Florida, USA. It is themed around the Mummy film series.

An identical roller coaster also called Revenge of the Mummy opened with Universal Studios Singapore in 2010.

The addition of Revenge of the Mummy was announced in May 2003. It opened on May 21, 2004.

Revenge of the Mummy is a launched roller coaster built by Premier Rides. The ride has three LIM launches, each of which are synchronized with a special effect or element, such as a turntable. The ride has multiple stops for show scenes featuring animatronics based on antagonists from the film series. Many projection effects are seen throughout the ride, including the turntable segment. There are also multiple dark sections with projections and lit up cutouts to simulate spirits and ghosts.

There are mandatory lockers in a nearby building in front of the attraction, similar to most other roller coasters across the park.
